translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Paul, apostle of Christ Jesus, byGod's will, and Timotheus the brother,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to the holy and faithful brethren in Christ which [are] in Colosse. Grace to you and peace fromGod our Father [and Lord Jesus Christ].

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: We give thanks to theGod and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ continually [when] praying for you,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: having heard of your faith in Christ Jesus, and the love which ye have towards all the saints,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: on account of the hope which [is] laid up for you in the heavens; of which ye heard before in the word of the truth of the glad tidings,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: which are come to you, as [they are] in all the world, [and] are bearing fruit and growing, even as also among you, from the day ye heard [them] and knew indeed the grace ofGod, in truth:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: even as ye learned from Epaphras our beloved fellow-bondman, who is a faithful minister of Christ for you,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who has also manifested to us your love in [the] Spirit.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For this reason we also, from the day we heard [of your faith and love], do not cease praying and asking for you, to the end that ye may be filled with the full knowledge of his will, in all wisdom and spiritual understanding,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [so as] to walk worthily of the Lord unto all well-pleasing, bearing fruit in every good work, and growing by the true knowledge ofGod;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: strengthened with all power according to the might of his glory unto all endurance and longsuffering with joy;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: giving thanks to the Father, who has made us fit for sharing the portion of the saints in light,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who has delivered us from the authority of darkness, and translated [us] into the kingdom of the Son of his love:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: in whom we have redemption, the forgiveness of sins;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who is image of the invisibleGod, firstborn of all creation;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: because by him were created all things, the things in the heavens and the things upon the earth, the visible and the invisible, whether thrones, or lordships, or principalities, or authorities: all things have been created by him and for him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he is before all, and all things subsist together by him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he is the head of the body, the assembly; who is [the] beginning, firstborn from among the dead, that he might have the first place in all things:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for in him all the fulness [of theGodhead] was pleased to dwell,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and by him to reconcile all things to itself, having made peace by the blood of his cross — by him, whether the things on the earth or the things in the heavens.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And you, who once were alienated and enemies in mind by wicked works, yet now has it reconciled

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: in the body of his flesh through death; to present you holy and unblamable and irreproachable before it,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: if indeed ye abide in the faith founded and firm, and not moved away from the hope of the glad tidings, which ye have heard, which have been proclaimed in the whole creation which [is] under heaven, of which I Paul became minister.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Now, I rejoice in sufferings for you, and I fill up that which is behind of the tribulations of Christ in my flesh, for his body, which is the assembly;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: of which I became minister, according to the dispensation ofGod which [is] given me towards you to complete the word ofGod,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: the mystery which [has been] hidden from ages and from generations, but has now been made manifest to his saints;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to whomGod would make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the nations, which is Christ in you the hope of glory:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: whom we announce, admonishing every man, and teaching every man, in all wisdom, to the end that we may present every man perfect in Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whereunto also I toil, combating according to his working, which works in me in power.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For I would have you know what combat I have for you, and those in Laodicea, and as many as have not seen my face in flesh;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to the end that their hearts may be encouraged, being united together in love, and unto all riches of the full assurance of understanding, to [the] full knowledge of the mystery ofGod;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: in which are hid all the treasures of wisdom and of knowledge.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I say this to the end that no one may delude you by persuasive speech.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For if indeed in the flesh I am absent, yet I am with you in spirit, rejoicing and seeing your order, and the firmness of your faith in Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: As therefore ye have received the Christ, Jesus the Lord, walk in him,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: rooted and built up in him, and assured in the faith, even as ye have been taught, abounding in it with thanksgiving.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: See that there be no one who shall lead you away as a prey through philosophy and vain deceit, according to the teaching of men, according to the elements of the world, and not according to Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For in him dwells all the fulness of theGodhead bodily;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and ye are complete in him, who is the head of all principality and authority,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: in whom also ye have been circumcised with circumcision not done by hand, in the putting off of the body of the flesh, in the circumcision of the Christ;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: buried with him in baptism, in which ye have been also raised with [him] through faith of the working ofGod who raised him from among the dead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And you, being dead in offences and in the uncircumcision of your flesh, he has quickened together with him, having forgiven us all the offences;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: having effaced the handwriting in ordinances which [stood out] against us, which was contrary to us, he has taken it also out of the way, having nailed it to the cross;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: having spoiled principalities and authorities, he made a show of them publicly, leading them in triumph by it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let none therefore judge you in meat or in drink, or in matter of feast, or new moon, or sabbaths,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: which are a shadow of things to come; but the body [is] of Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let no one fraudulently deprive you of your prize, doing his own will in humility and worship of angels, entering into things which he has not seen, vainly puffed up by the mind of his flesh,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and not holding fast the head, from whom all the body, ministered to and united together by the joints and bands, increases with the increase ofGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If ye have died with Christ from the elements of the world, why as [if] alive in [the] world do ye subject yourselves to ordinances?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Do not handle, do not taste, do not touch,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: (things which are all for destruction in the using [of them]:) according to the injunctions and teachings of men,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: (which have indeed an appearance of wisdom in voluntary worship, and humility, and harsh treatment of the body, not in a certain honour,) to [the] satisfaction of the flesh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If therefore ye have been raised with the Christ, seek the things [which are] above, where the Christ is, sitting at [the] right hand ofGod:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: have your mind on the things [that are] above, not on the things [that are] on the earth;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: for ye have died, and your life is hid with the Christ inGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: When the Christ is manifested who [is] our life, then shall ye also be manifested with him in glory.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Put to death therefore your members which [are] upon the earth, fornication, uncleanness, vile passions, evil lust, and unbridled desire, which is idolatry.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: On account of which things the wrath ofGod comes upon the sons of disobedience.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: In which ye also once walked when ye lived in these things.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But now, put off, ye also, all [these] things, wrath, anger, malice, blasphemy, vile language out of your mouth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Do not lie to one another, having put off the old man with his deeds,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and having put on the new, renewed into full knowledge according to [the] image of him that has created him;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: wherein there is not Greek and Jew, circumcision and uncircumcision, barbarian, Scythian, bondman, freeman; but Christ [is] everything, and in all.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Put on therefore, as [the] elect ofGod, holy and beloved, bowels of compassion, kindness, lowliness, meekness, longsuffering;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any should have a complaint against any; even as the Christ has forgiven you, so also [do] ye.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And to all these [add] love, which is the bond of perfectness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And let the peace of Christ preside in your hearts, to which also ye have been called in one body, and be thankful.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let the word of the Christ dwell in you richly, in all wisdom teaching and admonishing one another, in psalms, hymns, spiritual songs, singing with grace in your hearts toGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And everything, whatever ye may do in word or in deed, [do] all things in [the] name of [the] Lord Jesus, giving thanks toGod the Father by him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wives, be subject to [your] husbands, as is fitting in [the] Lord.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Husbands, love your wives, and be not bitter against them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Children, obey your parents in all things, for this is well-pleasing in [the] Lord.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Fathers, do not vex your children, to the end that they be not disheartened.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Bondmen, obey in all things your masters according to flesh; not with eye-services, as men-pleasers, but in simplicity of heart, fearing the Lord.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whatsoever ye do, labour at it heartily, as [doing it] to the Lord, and not to men;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: knowing that of [the] Lord ye shall receive the recompense of the inheritance; ye serve the Lord Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he that does a wrong shall receive the wrong he has done, and there is no respect of persons.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Masters, give to bondmen what is just and fair, knowing that ye also have a Master in [the] heavens.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Persevere in prayer, watching in it with thanksgiving;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: praying at the same time for us also, thatGod may open to us a door of the word to speak the mystery of Christ, on account of which also I am bound,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to the end that I may make it manifest as I ought to speak.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Walk in wisdom towards those without, redeeming opportunities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [Let] your word [be] always with grace, seasoned with salt, [so as] to know how ye ought to answer each one.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Tychicus, the beloved brother and faithful minister and fellow-bondman in [the] Lord, will make known to you all that concerns me;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: whom I have sent to you for this very purpose, that he might know your state, and that he might encourage your hearts:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: with Onesimus, the faithful and beloved brother, who is [one] of you. They shall make known to you everything here.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Aristarchus my fellow-captive salutes you, and Mark, Barnabas's cousin, concerning whom ye have received orders, (if he come to you, receive him,)

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and Jesus called Justus, who are of the circumcision. These [are the] only fellow-workers for the kingdom ofGod who have been a consolation to me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Epaphras, who is [one] of you, [the] bondman of Christ Jesus, salutes you, always combating earnestly for you in prayers, to the end that ye may stand perfect and complete in all [the] will ofGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For I bear him witness that he labours much for you, and them in Laodicea, and them in Hierapolis.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Luke, the beloved physician, salutes you, and Demas.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Salute the brethren in Laodicea, and Nymphas, and the assembly which [is] in his house.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And when the letter has been read among you, cause that it be read also in the assembly of Laodiceans, and that ye also read that from Laodicea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And say to Archippus, Take heed to the ministry which thou hast received in [the] Lord, to the end that thou fulfil it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The salutation by the hand of me Paul. Remember my bonds. Grace [be] with you.
